description_long: This is a pair of brown, closed-toe sandals with a minimalist design, featuring a single strap across the instep and an ankle strap with a small buckle at the back. The upper material appears to be a smooth, slightly matte leather or synthetic leather, with a subtle texture visible on the surface. The sole is thin and flat, with a slight elevation at the heel, and appears to be made of a denser, darker material, likely rubber or a similar composite. The interior is lined with a lighter, softer material for comfort, and the open sides provide breathability. The shoes have a handcrafted look, with visible stitching along the edges and a simple, functional silhouette. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the overall appearance suggests a practical, everyday urban footwear option.
description: A pair of brown, closed-toe sandals with ankle and instep straps, featuring a smooth leather-like finish and a flat, dark sole. The design is minimalist and practical, with visible stitching and no branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed rounded toes, instep straps, and the overall symmetrical shape of the shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open sides, ankle strap with buckle, and the thin, flat sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ankle straps, buckles, and the heel area of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open sides, strap placement, and the profile of the sole.
